summary: Good soundboard recording of a solid 1970 show, though a few tunes were a bit sloppy.
review: Both reviewers rate the performance positively, noting that the early and late sets were combined for this release and that Jerry Garcia and Mickey Hart were on stage. The soundboard source is described as good with no major flaws, but the band was “a tad sloppy” on a couple of numbers. Overall it’s an enjoyable capture for fans despite the minor performance hiccups.

ai_rating.rationale: Two generally positive reviews highlight good soundboard quality and a decent show, though one mentions slight sloppiness; limited number of reviews keeps confidence low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call the recording "Good" with no specific issues noted; the sound appears clear and balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The release appears to splice together both early and late shows (early set ending in UJB, then a separate late show), which some listeners feel makes the pacing slightly uneven.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Presence noted; performance described as slightly sloppy on a couple of tunes.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mickey Hart is highlighted, but overall the band was a tad sloppy on some numbers.
